claim.observation: 7z l of vanko-c-drive.CYLR.7z reports Type = 7z and lists a top-level folder 'vanko-c-drive.CYLR' containing a volume root 'vanko-c-drive.CYLR/G' under which Windows directory structures are preserved (e.g. ProgramData/Microsoft/Search and Users/<profile>/AppData paths). The archive summary line reports '6576 files, 1750 folders'.
claim.interpretation: The archive is a CYLR-style live-response triage collection (its top-level folder uses the '.CYLR' naming convention of the CYLR collection tool) gathered from a Windows volume that was referenced as drive letter G at collection time and labelled 'vanko-c-drive'. It preserves the original directory tree of selected forensic locations (search index, user AppData/browser profiles, etc.) and contains 6576 files across 1750 folders. Entry timestamps inside the archive are file metadata and do not by themselves establish when collection occurred or any user activity. This characterises the scope of the triage dataset only.
